title: TransactionAction
description: A business-logic decision on a transaction request: what action was taken and why. Shared by refund schema-compliance and logic-consistency scenarios (docs/test-strategy.md categories 3 and 5).

amount.description: The amount from the request being decided on. Not constrained to be positive — a rejected negative/zero amount may still be echoed here for diagnostics.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable explanation for the chosen action, e.g. DAILY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, BIN_MISMATCH, DUPLICATE_SUBMISSION, INVALID_AMOUNT.
